description: Techniques for developing long suits, driving out stoppers, and creating extra tricks through length and persistence.

hands.title: 61. Establishing a long suit in notrump
hands.notes: Drive out the Ace of diamonds to establish the long diamond suit for length winners. Lead diamonds early and persist until the Ace is dislodged.

hands.title: 62. Giving up a trick to gain several tricks
hands.notes: Lose one diamond trick to the Ace to set up four diamond winners. Giving up one trick gains four in return.

hands.title: 63. Drive out an honor to set up a suit
hands.notes: Lead the Queen of diamonds to knock out the Ace. Once the stopper is removed, the remaining diamonds are all winners.

hands.title: 64. Choosing which suit to establish
hands.notes: Diamonds offer 5 cards between the hands and need only one stopper removed. Clubs are already set. Choose diamonds over hearts for the best development.

hands.title: 65. Establishing the longest suit
hands.notes: South has 6 diamonds. Drive out the Ace to establish 5 diamond winners. The longest suit yields the most tricks.

hands.title: 66. Establishing a side suit in a trump contract
hands.notes: Draw trumps, then establish the diamond side suit by driving out the Ace and Queen. Use dummy entries to reach the established diamonds for discards.

hands.title: 67. Knocking out the stopper
hands.notes: Lead the Queen of diamonds to attack the Ace, the key honor stopping the suit. Once removed, the suit runs for 4 tricks.

hands.title: 68. Timing suit establishment before defenders cash winners
hands.notes: Establish diamonds immediately before West can set up spades. Timing is critical: if you delay, the defense cashes spade winners first.

hands.title: 69. Establishing a suit with limited entries
hands.notes: Entries to the South hand are limited. Plan the order of play carefully to drive out the diamond Ace and still have an entry back to cash established diamonds.

hands.title: 70. Developing tricks in the short hand
hands.notes: Develop diamonds from the North hand (short in combined holding) by leading toward honors. The J94 opposite KT73 can develop tricks with careful play.

hands.title: 71. Developing tricks in the long hand
hands.notes: South has 6 diamonds. Drive out the Ace and the suit runs. Developing the long hand is straightforward when you have the entries.

hands.title: 72. Suit establishment with unblock required
hands.notes: The King of diamonds in dummy must be played early (unblocked) to avoid blocking the run of the suit. Play the King under the Queen or Jack to keep communication open.

hands.title: 73. Setting up a suit by force
hands.notes: Force out the diamond Ace by leading the Queen. The defenders must take their Ace, giving you four diamond winners by force.

hands.title: 74. Choosing between finesse and establishment
hands.notes: A club finesse might gain a trick, but establishing diamonds by force is guaranteed. Choose the certain line of play over the 50-50 finesse.

hands.title: 75. Establishing a suit while maintaining communication
hands.notes: Preserve the spade Ace as an entry to the South hand after diamonds are established. Do not waste entries prematurely.

hands.title: 76. When the defense can attack your entry suit
hands.notes: West leads spades, attacking your only entry to the South hand. Win the Ace at the right moment to preserve access to established diamonds.

hands.title: 77. Establishing a suit before losing control
hands.notes: Establish diamonds before the defense sets up their spade suit. You must drive out the diamond Ace before losing control of spades.

hands.title: 78. Building a side suit through ruffing
hands.notes: Ruff diamonds in dummy to establish the long diamonds. After drawing trumps and ruffing twice, the remaining diamonds become winners.

hands.title: 79. Length winners in notrump
hands.notes: The 6-card diamond suit produces length winners once the Ace is driven out and the suit splits. Extra tricks come from outlasting the defenders in the suit.

hands.title: 80. Length winners in suit contracts
hands.notes: Establish the long diamond suit as a source of discards. After drawing trumps and losing to the AQ of diamonds, the remaining diamonds provide discards for spade and club losers.
